scripts.build: npm.cmd run build -w @aeropath/shared && npm.cmd run build -w @aeropath/api && npm.cmd run build -w @aeropath/web
scripts.lint: npm.cmd run lint -w @aeropath/api && npm.cmd run lint -w @aeropath/web
scripts.typecheck: npm.cmd run typecheck -w @aeropath/shared && npm.cmd run typecheck -w @aeropath/api && npm.cmd run typecheck -w @aeropath/web
